articles.description: Follow live coverage of three Premier League games on Sunday, starting with the Tyne-Wear derby as Newcastle host rivals Sunderland.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE: Build up to Newcastle vs Sunderland, Aston Villa vs West Ham & Spurs vs Forest

articles.description: Premier League leaders Arsenal face title rivals Manchester City in the EFL Cup final on Sunday, but how important could the result prove in title race?
articles.title: Carabao Cup: Who needs final victory more? Mikel Arteta or Pep Guardiola?

articles.description: Chelsea enter freefall after another defeat - 3-0 away at Everton - and have two weeks over the international break to stew on a damaging 10 days.
articles.title: Chelsea decline: Who is to blame and how bad has it got?

articles.description: Arne Slot needs answers quickly or Liverpool's unwanted records may no longer be his only worry.
articles.title: Brighton 2-1 Liverpool: 'If Reds play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'

articles.description: The debate around fighter pay reemerges at UFC London amid some career-defining performances on the undercard.
articles.title: UFC London: Fighter pay debate laid bare as Conor Benn deal described as 'heartbreaking'

articles.description: The fight for Champions League football appears to be turning into one no-one wants to win, but have Everton snuck into the race?
articles.title: The race no-one wants to win – are Everton serious top-five contenders?

articles.description: Josh Kerr completes his post-injury return to the top of a global podium in thrilling fashion as he reclaims his world indoor 3,000m title.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Josh Kerr reclaims 3,000m title

articles.description: Australia's Hannah Green claims a third successive tournament win at the Australian WPGA Championship on the Gold Coast.
articles.title: Australian WPGA: Hannah Green claims third successive tournament win

articles.description: LeBron James sets the record for the most regular-season games played in NBA history as he helps the Los Angeles Lakers to a dramatic buzzer-beating 105-104 victory against the Orlando Magic in his 1,612th outing.
articles.title: LeBron James sets NBA appearance record in dramatic LA Lakers win

articles.description: Leicester forward Alisha Lehmann  is the most-followed female footballer in the world and says she has learned to cope.
articles.title: Alisha Lehmann: Leicester striker on social media and coping with online criticism
